overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character exploring an elevated jungle settlement. The character walks along wooden walkways built around massive trees and rocky cliffs in a misty alien forest environment with vibrant bioluminescent flora.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway along rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated metal and wooden walkways built into the cliffside, approaching a large tree platform

entered.detail: tall moss-covered rock formation with layered stone texture
elevated metal walkway with grid pattern flooring
massive tree trunk with rough bark texture rising vertically
elevated wooden deck with railings built around the tree

segments.scene_description: The Na'vi character walks along elevated metal and wooden walkways built into a rocky cliff face. Massive trees rise in the background while mist drifts through the dense alien jungle environment.

events.description: character enters sheltered area under large fabric canopy
interaction prompt appears for NPC named 'Eetu' near workbench

agents.ego_description: walking under fabric canopies and approaching a workbench area with an NPC

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near workbench with available interaction prompt

entered.detail: large orange fabric tarp stretched overhead providing shelter
wooden crafting table with tools and items on surface
rough wooden fence along platform edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves under large fabric canopies covering a wooden platform. A workbench and an NPC become visible as the character explores this sheltered crafting area built around the massive tree.

events.description: exiting canopy cover into open overlook with panoramic view of settlement

agents.ego_description: walking along open platform overlooking a settlement in the valley below, pausing to observe

entered.detail: distant village with multiple structures and platforms visible through mist
large planter boxes containing alien flora with purple and green leaves

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canopy, the character walks along an open overlook with a panoramic view of a settlement below. Large potted alien plants with purple foliage line the wooden walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: canopy walkway approaching large tree trunk

events.description: character approaches and begins to navigate around large tree trunk

agents.ego_description: walking under yellow fabric canopies toward a massive tree trunk, navigating the elevated path

entered.detail: weathered yellow tarp stretched between trees providing partial cover
thick wooden posts supporting the elevated walkway structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues along elevated walkways shaded by yellow fabric canopies, approaching a massive tree trunk. The path winds through the misty jungle canopy with wooden support beams visible along the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an elevated jungle settlement that transitions from a misty cliffside path into a sheltered hub and finally toward a massive central tree. It begins with the Na'vi character walking along metal and wooden walkways built into a rocky cliff face, surrounded by drifting mist and towering alien trees. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts under large fabric canopies into a sheltered crafting area featuring a workbench and an NPC. The path then opens onto an expansive overlook lined with purple foliage, offering a panoramic view of the settlement below before turning back under yellow fabric canopies. Finally, the camera winds through the misty canopy along wooden support beams, approaching the base of a massive tree trunk.
